message:
feat(node): multi-token chain delegation with replay protection

Extends audience token verification to support multi-token delegation
chains (INV-ABT-REPLAY). When a token has a parent_token_hash, the
replay check now skips the root token and validates only the
delegation chain, enabling hierarchical authorization without
requiring the root token to pass replay detection.

Also applies saturating arithmetic to all token metrics (issued,
expired, revoked, replayed counters) and nonce replenishment
(saturating_sub).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
